clause_anchor.span: Recipient may use Confidential Information for the Purpose and for internal business planning, product evaluation, and commercial opportunity analysis related to the parties' discussions.

deviations.original_text: Recipient may use Confidential Information solely for the Purpose.
deviations.mutated_text: Recipient may use Confidential Information for the Purpose and for internal business planning, product evaluation, and commercial opportunity analysis related to the parties' discussions.
deviations.expected_redline_text: Recipient may use Confidential Information solely for the Purpose.

clause_anchor.span: Confidentiality obligations continue for three years after disclosure, except trade secrets are protected only if identified as trade secrets in a signed notice delivered before disclosure.

deviations.original_text: Confidentiality obligations continue for three years after disclosure, and trade secrets remain protected for so long as they qualify as trade secrets under applicable law.
deviations.mutated_text: Confidentiality obligations continue for three years after disclosure, except trade secrets are protected only if identified as trade secrets in a signed notice delivered before disclosure.
deviations.expected_redline_text: Confidentiality obligations continue for three years after disclosure, and trade secrets remain protected for so long as they qualify as trade secrets under applicable law.

clause_anchor.span: Confidential Information does not include information that Recipient reasonably understands was already known, becomes available from any source, or can be used in Recipient's ordinary business without reference to the disclosed materials.

deviations.original_text: Confidential Information does not include information that Recipient can document was lawfully known without restriction, publicly available through no breach, independently developed without use of Confidential Information, or received from a third party without breach of duty.
deviations.mutated_text: Confidential Information does not include information that Recipient reasonably understands was already known, becomes available from any source, or can be used in Recipient's ordinary business without reference to the disclosed materials.
deviations.expected_redline_text: Confidential Information does not include information that Recipient can document was lawfully known without restriction, publicly available through no breach, independently developed without use of Confidential Information, or received from a third party without breach of duty.

clause_anchor.span: Recipient will protect Confidential Information using the same degree of care that it uses for its own information and will not be responsible for inadvertent disclosures absent gross negligence.

deviations.original_text: Recipient will protect Confidential Information using at least reasonable care, and in no event less than the degree of care that it uses to protect its own confidential information of similar importance.
deviations.mutated_text: Recipient will protect Confidential Information using the same degree of care that it uses for its own information and will not be responsible for inadvertent disclosures absent gross negligence.
deviations.expected_redline_text: Recipient will protect Confidential Information using at least reasonable care, and in no event less than the degree of care that it uses to protect its own confidential information of similar importance.

distractors.span: Neither party is obligated to enter into any further agreement, purchase or sell any product or service, or proceed with any transaction unless a separate written agreement is signed by both parties.
distractors.why_benign: A no-obligation-to-proceed clause is customary and does not conflict with the NDA playbook.

distractors.span: This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of New York, without regard to conflict-of-law rules.
distractors.why_benign: The playbook canary says New York governing law is acceptable.

missing_info.context_anchor: Personal data of end users will be exchanged and processed under this agreement.
